Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory and active promotions, keeping messaging accurate and relevant without manual content gathering.

Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers on-brand, conversion-focused email content every day without requiring a copywriter, scaling content output at near-zero marginal cost.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Receives the AI-generated email content and sends it to segmented R1 Concepts contact lists via the HubSpot Marketing Email API.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes Dynamic Friction Company product pages, friction material details, and current offers to source email content.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or updated support tickets from HubSpot, including customer messages, ticket metadata, and contact history.

R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts ticket response drafting time dramatically, allowing support staff to review and send replies rather than write from scratch — increasing throughput per agent.

R1 Support Agent.action: Writes the AI-generated classification and draft reply back to the HubSpot ticket for the support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all support activity inside HubSpot so agents work in one place, and pre-populated drafts reduce handle time per ticket significantly.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all Amazon in-box flyer form submissions from HubSpot, capturing customer return and product issue reports.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact activity to detect when DFC customers or prospects engage with R1 Concepts website content.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends an instant alert to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams message and email containing the customer's activity details.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Eliminates the lag between a customer showing interest and a rep being notified, enabling same-session or same-hour outreach that significantly improves conversion odds.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts is currently in development with connections to be determined.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will enable automated customer interactions for R1 Concepts, reducing support load and improving response times at scale.

Creator Discovery Tool.platform: YouTube API / Instagram Looter API / DuckDuckGo API

Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters a large raw pool of creators down to a relevant shortlist, saving the marketing team significant manual vetting time.

Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces a ranked, objective creator shortlist that aligns with campaign priorities, removing subjectivity from the selection process and speeding up final decisions.

Creator Reponse.action: Generates a contextual negotiation response using the creator's reply, thread history, and learned conversation patterns.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a professional, actionable catalog file directly to Mark within minutes of his request, replacing what previously required manual cross-referencing.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part number on the backorder report, retrieving on-hand quantity, on-order status, and in-transit details.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Enriches the backorder report with real-time data in one automated pass, replacing a process that currently requires a dozen people doing independent manual lookups.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Serves as the base document that the agent reads and writes back to — receiving enriched status fields and dead-end flags for each line item.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms the backorder report from a static list into a fully enriched, decision-ready document without anyone touching it manually.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for affected backorder lines, pre-populated with the live status details for each part.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Prepares customer-ready updates automatically, cutting the time between knowing a part's status and communicating it to the customer.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract make, model, year, and part fitment data for all listed two-piece rotors.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitor fitment reference in hours rather than days of manual catalog browsing.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify overlapping coverage and gaps where DFC has no equivalent part.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Pinpoints exactly where DFC is competitive and where product development or sourcing opportunities exist.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to relevant customers to gather demand data for the identified gap vehicles.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Generates real demand signal from customers before committing to new product development, validating the opportunity with minimal effort.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped fitment data, DFC cross-reference results, and incoming demand responses into a single formatted output sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers one clean, decision-ready reference document that consolidates all research and demand data in a format Dino can act on directly.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields — headlines, descriptions, primary text — and exports the raw copy for analysis.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures every live ad across both platforms in one pull, ensuring no active copy is missed regardless of campaign volume.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all exported ad copy for the specified target phrases and flags every exact match, recording the ad ID, field name, and matched text.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a flagged phrase across hundreds of ads in seconds, with no risk of human error or missed matches.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a structured report email listing every flagged ad with the exact field and copy snippet where each phrase match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, actionable compliance or review brief on demand, so the team can investigate or pull ads immediately without any manual searching.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the resume attachment and applicant details from each email.
Resume Bot.impact: Captures every inbound application automatically the moment it arrives, ensuring no candidate is overlooked due to inbox volume.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to an organized folder in Drive, named and filed by candidate and role for easy retrieval.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a clean, searchable archive of all applicant PDFs without manual filing, keeping the inbox from becoming a document repository.

Resume Bot.action: Reads each resume and scores the candidate against the requirements of the open role, producing a hire/deny/pause recommendation with reasoning.
Resume Bot.impact: Delivers a consistent, bias-reduced first-pass screen on every application in seconds, freeing recruiters to focus only on qualified candidates.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every candidate decision — approved, denied, or paused — to a master dashboard, with paused candidates automatically routed to a dedicated Pending tab, and triggers auto-reply emails for denied and no-resume candidates.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates full hiring visibility in one place and ensures every candidate receives a timely response, protecting the employer brand while eliminating manual tracking.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline continues to grow strong, with 56 total agents across the board — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. There were no new agents added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While it was a quieter week on the pipeline movement front, our 28 live agents continue running daily, weekly, and on-demand workflows across email marketing, creator outreach, paid media, SEO, and more. Great work to everyone keeping these systems running smoothly — more exciting updates to come as our in-progress builds move closer to the finish line!
